---
title: "About me"

    
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

I received my PhD in Neuroscience at the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus in 2020 and then pursued further graduate studies in Statistics at Texas A&M University. I'm now employed as a Senior Biostatistician at Westat, where I get to contribute to a range of projects in public health, epidemiology, and genomics.

I love nothing more than helping out! If you think I can help you with anything - from stats to scientific illustration to image analysis to writing, or anything in between - please don't hesitate to shoot me a quick email and say hello. My contact info is [here](CV_2022.pdf).



I built this website with the R package {Distill}, which you can learn more about [here](https://rstudio.github.io/distill/).
